name: CreditUsageReportPeriod
description: CreditUsageReportPeriod schema from Censys Platform API

credits_added.description: The total amount of credits added during the report period.

credits_consumed.description: The total amount of credits consumed during the report period.

credits_expired.description: The total amount of credits expired during the report period.

end_date.description: The end date of the window for this report period.

start_date.description: The start date of the window for this report period.

transaction_count.description: The total number of transactions during the report period.
